choices.text: Memory safety without GC, predictable performance (BPF compile target), zero-cost abstractions, strong type system. Tradeoff: steeper learning curve than Solidity. Borrow checker catches bugs at compile time.

questions.prompt: Avoid program crash on missing data?

choices.text: Pattern match Option or use Result + ? operator. .unwrap() panics → halts transaction with error. Always handle None / Err explicitly; return MyError::NotFound.into() for cleaner client UX.

questions.explanation: Match Option / Result + ? — never unwrap() in programs.
